metadata.description: Official daily.dev plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: daily.dev
plugins.description: Overcome LLM knowledge cutoffs with real-time developer content. daily.dev aggregates articles from thousands of sources, validated by community engagement, with structured taxonomy for precise discovery.

plugins.name: daily-dev-ask
plugins.description: Answer technical questions using daily.dev's knowledge base. Searches articles from the developer community and synthesizes answers with source links.
